data.body:
Goal:
The test `rotates to a different pooled agent on error retry in basic mode` at `src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-queue-claims.test.ts:486` fails under default vitest parallel execution but passes with `--fileParallelism=false` and when run in isolation. CI has been red since commit `4b391366` ("unify agent dispatch on workflow descriptor; delete silent fallbacks") because of this flake.

Verification:
1. `bun run test` exits 0 with default parallelism.
2. `bun run test:coverage` exits 0 (CI-equivalent run).
3. The test continues to assert `selected="agent-b"` on iteration 2 after a child close exit 1 with `basicSettingsWithTwoAgents`.
4. No other test files regressed.

Constraints:
- Root-cause the failure (race between parallel worker state, timing of waitFor, or a legitimate dispatch bug) rather than marking the test sequential or skipped.
data.title: Stabilize terminal-manager-queue-claims basic-mode rotation test under parallelism
